finding_results.evidence: chapters/chapter_13.md:93; chapters/chapter_13.md:101; chapters/chapter_13.md:105; chapters/chapter_13.md:109; chapters/chapter_13.md:211; chapters/chapter_13.md:215; chapters/chapter_13.md:227; chapters/chapter_13.md:233; chapters/chapter_13.md:301; chapters/chapter_13.md:303
finding_results.notes: Ron scene: Restored snapshot's rougher spoken texture throughout. Line 101 now has two restarts ('becomes — look' and 'you had a whole —') instead of clean thesis metaphor ('the whole map'). Line 105 replaced the polished insight ('you'd come up for air by yourself. You didn't. Not till there was nothing left to save.') with an abandoned thought about Ron's own failure to speak ('I kept thinking I'd say something, and then I didn't, and by the time I did it was—'). Line 109 cut the polished diagnosis ('let that place make every decision small enough that staying feels like the easy one'), keeping only the concrete worry about not leaving. Line 93 replaced the aphoristic 'forget whole categories of being alive when work gets its teeth in you' with Ron catching himself mid-diagnosis ('I meant—... Yeah. I meant it a bit.'). Cut the added banter exchange (lines 121-133 in prior version) that extended past the scene's natural landing. Restored 'I suppose it matters' hedging from snapshot at line 131. Harry scene: Line 211 roughened with a restart ('Not because they care about — look'). Line 215 replaced 'This is the professional part of the conversation' thesis-speech with concrete pressure and an interrupted thought ('That's—' with gesture at folder). Line 227 replaced Ginny's quotable thesis with Harry pulling back ('She also said—... You know what she said.'). Line 233 replaced the five-sentence meta-summary with an interrupted, abbreviated warning ('I don't even know what I'd—... Just don't let it get ahead of you.'). Echo lines at 301-303 updated to match revised dialogue. Both scenes now contain multiple interrupted or abandoned thoughts and turn on concrete immediate pressures (Ron's failure to speak up during the marriage; the folder on Harry's desk) rather than aphoristic diagnosis.

summary: Single finding addressed: roughened all diagnostic dialogue beats in both the Ron pub scene and Harry office scene. Restored snapshot-era spoken texture (restarts, abandoned clauses, mid-sentence corrections) that had been polished into clean thesis statements during prior revision. Ron's speech now fumbles toward its point through failed starts and an abandoned thought about his own silence during the marriage rather than delivering a composed pattern-analysis. Harry's warnings now anchor to the concrete institutional threat (Croaker's intervention, the folder) rather than arriving as multi-beat rhetorical summaries. Cut an added banter exchange that extended past the Ron scene's natural close. Updated entrance-hall echo lines to reflect revised dialogue. No structural, continuity, or Manor-scene changes.
